message:
feat(validate): implement built-in validators (bd-2ybr)

Add common validation patterns as built-in validators:
- uuid: RFC 4122 UUID format
- ipv4: IPv4 address validation
- ipv6: IPv6 address validation (including :: abbreviation)
- mac_address: MAC address (colon or hyphen separated)
- slug: URL-safe slug (lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens)
- hex_color: Hex color codes (#RGB or #RRGGBB)
- phone: E.164 phone number format
- credit_card: Credit card validation with Luhn algorithm

Simple validators use regex patterns (like existing email/url).
Credit card uses runtime Luhn algorithm check for proper validation.

Also adds:
- CreditCard variant to ValidationErrorKind
- add_credit_card() method to ValidationError
- is_valid_credit_card() function in sqlmodel_core::validate
- 23 new tests covering all validators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
